expectedOutput: Returns are accepted within 30 days of purchase with original receipt. Items must be in original, unused condition with all tags attached.

input: How do I track my order?
expectedOutput: Log into your account, go to Order History, and click the tracking link next to your order. You'll see real-time updates on your shipment status.
Our customer support is available Monday through Friday, 9am to 6pm EST. Live chat is available 24/7 for urgent issues.
Yes! Free standard shipping is available on all orders over $50 within the continental US. International shipping has additional fees.

input: How do I reset my password?
expectedOutput: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email address, and follow the link sent to your inbox. The reset link expires in 24 hours.

input: What payment methods do you accept?
expectedOutput: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.

input: Can I change or cancel my order after placing it?
expectedOutput: You can modify or cancel your order within 1 hour of placement through your Order History page. After that window, the order enters processing and cannot be changed — you'll need to use our return process after delivery.

input: Is my personal information safe with you?
expectedOutput: Absolutely. We use industry-standard encryption and never sell your personal data to third parties. Our privacy policy details exactly how we collect, use, and protect your information.

input: Do you have a mobile app?
expectedOutput: Yes, our mobile app is available for both iOS and Android. Download it from the App Store or Google Play to shop, track orders, and manage your account on the go.

input: How do I contact customer support?
expectedOutput: Reach us via email at support@example.com, live chat on our website (available 24/7), or phone at 1-800-EXAMPLE during business hours (Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST). Average response time is under 2 hours.
